creator: dv@tjcollection.ru
text:
The port configured with "DBL" scripts by "make config" failed to build.

ns1# portupgrade rejik
--->  Upgrading 'rejik-3.2.4' to 'rejik-3.2.5' (www/rejik)
--->  Building '/usr/ports/www/rejik'
===>  Cleaning for rejik-3.2.5
===>  Found saved configuration for rejik-3.2.4
===>  Extracting for rejik-3.2.5
=> MD5 Checksum OK for redirector-3.2.5.tgz.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for redirector-3.2.5.tgz.
=> MD5 Checksum OK for banlists-2.x.x.tgz.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for banlists-2.x.x.tgz.
=> MD5 Checksum OK for squid-like-www-en.tgz.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for squid-like-www-en.tgz.
=> No MD5 checksum recorded for dbl-2.0.tgz.
=> No SHA256 checksum recorded for dbl-2.0.tgz.
=> No suitable checksum found for dbl-2.0.tgz.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/www/rejik.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/www/rejik.

Fix: 

fetch the  dbl-2.0.tgz manually and "make makesum"
How-To-Repeat: check the DBL option in the port and make install
